summary: Daily LLM-driven assembly line that turns trending social signals into a publish-ready multimodal campaign (X thread + image + audio + QR composite) with operator one-click approval.

parameters.description: Custom domain for the deployed worker (artifact URLs embed this).
URL the composited QR code points at on each campaign image.
Cron expression controlling automatic campaign generation cadence (UTC).
Require operator Pushover acknowledgement before any publish action.

recipes.summary: Council assembly line: chains specialized LLMs and production APIs into a daily multimodal marketing campaign artifact.

templates.label: Daily 09:00 ET cadence
templates.hint: Default cadence — fires once daily at 09:00 America/New_York (14:00 UTC).

templates.label: Weekdays only 09:00 ET
templates.hint: Skips weekends — cron fires Mon–Fri at 14:00 UTC.

templates.label: Manual trigger only
templates.hint: No cron — operator fires via POST /api/trigger when desired.
